requirement_topic.en: SASO Technical Regulation and SABER Conformity Registration — Labelling, Arabic Marking and Importer Obligations
requirement_topic.zh: SASO技术法规与SABER符合性注册——标签、阿拉伯文标识及进口商义务
requirement_topic.zht: SASO技術法規與SABER符合性註冊——標籤、阿拉伯文標識及進口商義務

summary.en: Saudi Arabia regulates lithium batteries and power banks through SASO (Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization) technical regulations enforced via the mandatory SABER electronic conformity platform. Key obligations for portable batteries: (1) SABER registration — the product must be registered on SABER by a Saudi-established importer, who obtains a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC, valid one year) from a SASO-notified conformity assessment body, then a Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) for each consignment before customs clearance at ports such as Jeddah or Dammam. (2) Conformity basis — PCoC issuance requires test evidence against the applicable SASO-adopted standards (SASO/IEC 62133 for cell safety) and the relevant SASO technical regulation. (3) Labelling and Arabic marking — products must carry rated capacity, chemistry, manufacturer/importer identification, and Saudi-required Arabic-language marking and safety information. (4) Importer of record — a Saudi-established importer must hold the SABER records and is the responsible party for market surveillance by SASO.
summary.zh: 沙特通过SASO（沙特标准、计量及质量组织）技术法规对锂电池和移动电源进行监管，并借由强制性SABER电子符合性平台执行。便携式电池的主要义务：（1）SABER注册——产品须由在沙特设立的进口商在SABER平台注册，该进口商从SASO认可的合格评定机构取得有效期一年的产品符合证书（PCoC），随后在吉达或达曼等港口清关前对每批货物取得装运符合证书（SCoC）。（2）符合性依据——签发PCoC须提供依据适用SASO采纳标准（电芯安全为SASO/IEC 62133）及相关SASO技术法规的测试证据。（3）标签及阿拉伯文标识——产品须标注额定容量、化学体系、制造商/进口商标识，以及沙特要求的阿拉伯文标识和安全信息。（4）登记进口商——须由在沙特设立的进口商持有SABER记录，并作为SASO市场监督的责任方。
summary.zht: 沙特通過SASO（沙特標準、計量及質量組織）技術法規對鋰電池和行動電源進行監管，並借由強制性SABER電子符合性平台執行。便攜式電池的主要義務：（1）SABER註冊——產品須由在沙特設立的進口商在SABER平台註冊，該進口商從SASO認可的合格評定機構取得有效期一年的產品符合證書（PCoC），隨後在吉達或達曼等港口清關前對每批貨物取得裝運符合證書（SCoC）。（2）符合性依據——簽發PCoC須提供依據適用SASO採納標準（電芯安全為SASO/IEC 62133）及相關SASO技術法規的測試證據。（3）標籤及阿拉伯文標識——產品須標註額定容量、化學體系、製造商/進口商標識，以及沙特要求的阿拉伯文標識和安全信息。（4）登記進口商——須由在沙特設立的進口商持有SABER記錄，並作為SASO市場監督的責任方。

standards_or_laws: SABER platform — mandatory electronic conformity and product/shipment certification system operated under SASO (saber.sa)
SASO technical regulations — Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization product regulations for electrical products and batteries
Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) and Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) — SABER certification instruments

summary.en: China does not have a directly equivalent single regulation. Portable lithium battery packs for export are primarily subject to GB 31241-2022 (safety), product registration with customs (import/export declarations), and for certain rechargeable battery products, mandatory CCC certification under CNCA catalogue. There is no CN equivalent of the SABER product-plus-per-shipment conformity gateway, the Saudi importer-of-record obligation, or the Arabic-language marking framework. China's own EPR scheme (producer responsibility for waste batteries under the Solid Waste Law and the 2021 Battery Recycling Management Measures) applies domestically but differs structurally from the Saudi regime.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接对应的单一法规。出口便携式锂电池组主要受GB 31241-2022（安全）、海关产品注册（进出口申报）约束，部分可充电电池产品还须依据CNCA目录取得强制性CCC认证。中国没有等同于SABER产品加逐批装运符合性门户、沙特登记进口商义务或阿拉伯文标识框架的对应制度。中国自身的EPR制度（《固体废物法》及2021年《废旧电池回收管理办法》下的生产者责任）属国内要求，在结构上与沙特制度存在差异。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接對應的單一法規。出口便攜式鋰電池組主要受GB 31241-2022（安全）、海關產品登記（進出口申報）約束，部分可充電電池產品還須依據CNCA目錄取得強制性CCC認證。中國沒有等同於SABER產品加逐批裝運符合性門戶、沙特登記進口商義務或阿拉伯文標識框架的對應制度。中國自身的EPR制度（《固體廢物法》及2021年《廢舊電池回收管理辦法》下的生產者責任）屬國內要求，在結構上與沙特制度存在差異。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
PRC Solid Waste Pollution Prevention and Control Law (2020 revision) — domestic EPR framework
MIIT/NDRC Battery Recycling Management Measures (2021) — domestic recycling obligations

gap.en: The Saudi SASO/SABER regime introduces obligations with no Chinese equivalent: (1) mandatory SABER registration producing a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) and a separate Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) for every consignment — a two-tier electronic gateway absent from Chinese export practice; (2) a Saudi-established importer of record who holds the SABER records and answers to SASO; (3) Arabic-language marking and Saudi-specific labelling that differ from Chinese domestic labels; (4) conformity must be demonstrated against SASO technical regulations and SASO-adopted standards (e.g., SASO/IEC 62133), not GB 31241. These are structural compliance gaps requiring an in-country importer, SABER account setup, and SASO-notified-body testing before Saudi market entry.
gap.zh: 沙特SASO/SABER制度引入了中国无对应制度的义务：（1）强制性SABER注册，须取得产品符合证书（PCoC）及对每批货物单独取得装运符合证书（SCoC）——这种两级电子门户在中国出口实务中不存在；（2）须有在沙特设立的登记进口商持有SABER记录并对SASO负责；（3）阿拉伯文标识及沙特特有标签，与中国国内标签不同；（4）符合性须依据SASO技术法规及SASO采纳标准（如SASO/IEC 62133）证明，而非GB 31241。这些属于结构性合规缺口，进入沙特市场前需要本地进口商、SABER账户设立及SASO认可机构测试。
gap.zht: 沙特SASO/SABER制度引入了中國無對應制度的義務：（1）強制性SABER註冊，須取得產品符合證書（PCoC）及對每批貨物單獨取得裝運符合證書（SCoC）——這種兩級電子門戶在中國出口實務中不存在；（2）須有在沙特設立的登記進口商持有SABER記錄並對SASO負責；（3）阿拉伯文標識及沙特特有標籤，與中國國內標籤不同；（4）符合性須依據SASO技術法規及SASO採納標準（如SASO/IEC 62133）證明，而非GB 31241。這些屬於結構性合規缺口，進入沙特市場前需要本地進口商、SABER賬戶設立及SASO認可機構測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SABER registration with PCoC and per-shipment SCoC is required before customs clearance into Saudi Arabia for regulated products; conformity must be against SASO technical regulations and SASO-adopted standards; a Saudi-established importer of record is required
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable in equivalent form — GB 31241 safety compliance and customs declaration are domestic export requirements; no SABER-style product/shipment conformity gateway, Saudi importer-of-record, or Arabic marking obligation applies to Chinese exporters under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The SASO technical regulation enforced via the mandatory SABER platform is the central market-access gap for Chinese portable battery / power bank exporters to Saudi Arabia. Exporters (through a Saudi importer) must complete SABER registration, obtain a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) from a SASO-notified body and a Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) per consignment, apply Arabic-language marking, and demonstrate conformity against SASO-adopted standards such as SASO/IEC 62133. Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification does not by itself satisfy these obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 通过强制性SABER平台执行的SASO技术法规，是中国便携式电池/移动电源出口商进入沙特市场的核心准入差距。出口商（通过沙特进口商）须完成SABER注册，从SASO认可机构取得产品符合证书（PCoC）并对每批货物取得装运符合证书（SCoC），加贴阿拉伯文标识，并依据SASO/IEC 62133等SASO采纳标准证明符合性。中国GB 31241或CCC认证本身不能满足上述义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 通過強制性SABER平台執行的SASO技術法規，是中國便攜式電池/行動電源出口商進入沙特市場的核心准入差距。出口商（通過沙特進口商）須完成SABER註冊，從SASO認可機構取得產品符合證書（PCoC）並對每批貨物取得裝運符合證書（SCoC），加貼阿拉伯文標識，並依據SASO/IEC 62133等SASO採納標準證明符合性。中國GB 31241或CCC認證本身不能滿足上述義務。

source.publisher: SABER — Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SASO) conformity platform
